LearnHNS Market

What is the LearnHNS Market?

market.learnhns.com is our dedicated ShakeDex channel marketplace.

Unlike traditional centralized exchanges or registrars, ShakeDex is a completely decentralized, non-custodial exchange protocol built directly on top of the Handshake blockchain. As a "Channel", the LearnHNS Market serves as an indexer and user interface designed to distribute and display ShakeDex marketplace listing proofs.

How it Works

  • Self-Custody: You never deposit your HNS coins or domain names into a centralized wallet. Everything remains securely in your own local wallet (like Bob Wallet or the LearnHNS extension).
  • Listing Proofs: When a user lists a Handshake name for sale, they generate a cryptographic "proof" of that listing. Our channel aggregates, organizes, and distributes these proofs so buyers can easily discover them.
  • Trustless Trading: Transactions are executed entirely on-chain via atomic swaps (covenants). The ShakeDex protocol ensures that the domain name and the funds are exchanged simultaneously without any middleman ever taking custody of your assets.
Enter market.learnhns.com

Live Market Data
